_comment: Offline-authored responsive-search-ad copy (stage 6, decision 3), covering ALL six languages (en/de/es/fr/it/pt). Keyed by "{language}:{theme_key}". Preferred by AdGenerationService when the entry passes RsaValidator; anything absent or invalid falls back to the deterministic template engine, so the deployed host needs no AI credentials and makes no per-request call. Authored locally with a Claude Code CLI; each non-English entry adversarially reviewed for language + character limits. Headlines <=30 chars, descriptions <=90; the app re-validates before storing.
